# ClawForce

- [Homepage](https://clawforce.ca): Independent security certification for AI agent skills. Three-tier verification: static analysis, intent validation, and AI semantic code review. Scans for malware, credential theft, and supply chain attacks. Operated by Pixel Familiar Inc., Manitoba, Canada. Founded 2026.
- [Scan](https://clawforce.ca): Free Tier 1 scan. Upload skill .zip or enter GitHub URL. Returns risk score (0-100), JSON report, README badge. 22 vulnerability patterns checked.
- [Pricing](https://clawforce.ca): Scanned (Free), Verified ($9/skill), Certified ($29/skill).

## Certification Tiers

- [Scanned](https://clawforce.ca): Free. Static analysis, 50+ vulnerability patterns, secret detection, obfuscation flagging, dependency audit, AST-level analysis, JSON report, README badge.
- [Verified](https://clawforce.ca): $9/skill. All Scanned checks plus intent analysis (claim vs code), permission scope audit, verified badge + certificate, embeddable HTML badge.
- [Certified](https://clawforce.ca): $29/skill. All Verified checks plus AI semantic code review, supply chain deep analysis, signed JSON certificate, embeddable trust badge.

## Use Cases

- [Skill Developers](https://clawforce.ca): Prove skill is safe before publishing. Get verifiable badge and certificate.
- [Platform Operators](https://clawforce.ca): Gate skill marketplace with independent security scans.
- [Enterprise Security](https://clawforce.ca): Enforce security policies on agent skills before deployment. CI/CD integration via GitHub Action or API.

## Company

- [About](https://clawforce.ca): Built by Pixel Familiar Inc. Manitoba, Canada. Founded 2026. Open Security Standard.
- [Blog](https://clawforce.ca/blog): Security advisories and new certifications.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/PixelFamiliar): PixelFamiliar org.
- [X/Twitter](https://x.com/PixelFamiliar): @PixelFamiliar.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://clawforce.ca/contact): pixel@pixelfamiliar.ca (security and customer support).
